evidence.note: Dedicated invariant spec is the stated source of truth and requires stable IDs, prose, machine-checkable predicates, source citations, and status.
Fifteen INV-* entries are listed with prose, predicate or predicate sketch, cite, and status.
Pass-status table maps IDs to STATED/TESTED/PROVED status, but it is not a full spec-coverage matrix mapping every ID to a checking tool.
The only Foundry invariant file contains two invariant_* functions: WETH conservation and a weaker contract-balance-vs-withdrawable check.

The spec marks many invariants as STATED or partial, with only INV-ARB-003 tied to the invariant test file and no comprehensive invariant suite for InstanceSale, FAOSale, FAOTwapResolver, or FutarchyTWAPOracle.
buy is externally state-changing and has implementation guards/effects but no explicit pre/post/frame/revert @spec block.
placeYesBond has useful @dev notes and an INV-ARB-005 tag, but not a pre/post/frame/revert-condition spec block.
buy has @dev bullets that imply preconditions, which matches the low anchor, but this pattern is not complete pre/post coverage.
A Foundry invariant enforces WETH totalSupply conservation across actors plus the arbitration contract.
The ragequit pro-rata law is stated with floor rounding and source citation, but it is not yet a dedicated invariant test.
Unit tests cover multi-token pro-rata rounding, but D4's 7 anchor requires dedicated invariant tests for conservation, pro-rata, and monotonicity.
The design doc states adversary capabilities, non-assumptions, concrete attack vectors A1-A8, and mitigations.
Adversary roles A1, A2, A4, A5, and A6 are described with actions and expected cost/impact bounds.
The wiki threat model is still a stub and explicitly TODO, so the repo does not reach the 7 anchor's defense-to-spec-ID mapping.
The spec defines required spec-to-implementation traceability, but says a future worker pass still needs to attach tags broadly.
A source-level @custom:spec tag references INV-TOKEN-001.
effectiveSupply is tagged to INV-SALE-001 with source behavior matching the cited invariant.
bindProposal and resolve carry @custom:spec tags for INV-TWAP-001 and INV-TWAP-002.
CI installs Foundry and runs forge fmt, forge build, and forge test.
Foundry is configured for the Solidity project, but there is no SMTChecker/model-checker profile here.
No invariant is marked PROVED; the PROVED column is explicitly a future goal once Certora/Halmos is wired.
tx.origin usage is isolated and documented with rationale and security constraints.
A unit test demonstrates migrate pulls staged tokens using tx.origin while msg.sender is the orchestrator.
ragequit loops over ragequitTokens without a stated MAX_RAGEQUIT_TOKENS or upper-bound invariant, blocking the 5 anchor.
The older FAOSale ragequit path has the same dynamic ragequitTokens loop without a formal upper bound.
Assembly exists in math code with source/origin comments, but there is no dedicated semantic model or decidability document.

evaluator_notes: No prior audit/evaluations/topic-3-evals.jsonl entry existed, so per-dimension deltas are null and regressions/improvements are empty. Weakest score is tied across D2, D3, and D7; D2 is listed as the weakest_dimension. I treated vendored lib/openzeppelin-contracts/certora as out of scope for root FAO formal-tool readiness and did not run forge test to avoid mutating build artifacts outside audit/evaluations.

evidence.note: Dedicated invariant spec states stable IDs, prose, machine-checkable predicates, source citations, status, and NatSpec/proof back-reference rules.
Fifteen INV-* entries are present with prose, predicate or predicate sketch, source cite, and status.
Pass-status table maps every ID to stated/tested/proved status, but it is not a complete tool-coverage matrix.
Representative source NatSpec back-reference uses @custom:spec for INV-ARB-005.

improvement_vs_prior.cause: Newly observed spec, invariant, threat-model, traceability, or verifier-hook evidence raises the anchor band.

evidence.note: InstanceSale now has three concrete invariant_* functions for effectiveSupply, initialPhaseFinalized monotonicity, and token supply accounting.
FutarchyArbitration still has two invariant_* functions: WETH conservation and a weaker balance-vs-withdrawable check.
Limiting observation: the suite header cites INV-SALE-002/003, but no invariant_* function asserts pro-rata payout or ragequit guards, blocking the 5 anchor.
Status table still shows many core invariants as partial, untested, or unproved.

improvement_vs_prior.cause: Newly observed spec, invariant, threat-model, traceability, or verifier-hook evidence raises the anchor band.

evidence.note: The spec says per-function pre/postcondition coverage lives in audit/specs/preconditions/, but that directory is not present in the current repo.
buy is externally state-changing and has guard/effect code but no explicit pre/post/frame/revert @spec block.
placeYesBond has useful @dev notes and an INV tag, but not a structured pre/post/frame/revert-condition block.
setOrchestrator, bindProposal, and resolve have notices or @custom:spec links, but no full pre/post/frame/revert specification.
Foundry invariant enforces WETH totalSupply conservation across actors plus the arbitration contract.
Foundry invariant enforces initialPhaseFinalized monotonicity for InstanceSale.

Unit test covers multi-token pro-rata rounding, but this is not a dedicated invariant test, so the 7 anchor is not met.

evidence.note: [profile.ci] increases fuzz runs, enables invariant runs/depth, and fails on unhandled reverts for normal CI.
SMTChecker and Halmos-oriented profiles are checked in; SMTChecker uses CHC over InstanceSale and FAOTwapResolver.
CI workflow configures a solc SMTChecker job and fails on assertion violation or CHC counterexample output.
CI workflow installs Halmos and runs it against invariant_INV_ tests; no committed green log or artifact is present, so the 7 anchor is not fully satisfied.

ragequit iterates over ragequitTokens.length with no MAX_RAGEQUIT_TOKENS or upper-bound invariant.

evaluator_notes: Scored against audit/rubrics/topic-3-spec-formalization.md at blob 1e46e23a6a398c7133bb27a4b119eb5ef3a1d1f1. Prior comparison uses the immediately preceding JSONL entry dated 2026-05-22T14:16:36Z.
